prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第26名，近年排名稳定在24–27位，属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（前卫校区浴池盗窃案）及学术不端舆情，可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第40（较热），有一定关注度；2025年投档异常信号显示江苏物理类法学暴跌2700位，黑龙江省临床组下降1000分，断档信号可能对次年报考有滞后影响；考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、化学A、数学A、机械工程A、法学A、物理学A、兽医学A、计算机科学与技术A-等15个A-/A/A+学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与吉大优势学科匹配度高；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约521000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约357675人增长约46%，按近年比例估算物理类约379000人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧，本科批物理类2025年463分，近年稳中有升；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，对本省考生无地域偏好加成；在江苏省招生占比约3–4%（2025年约199人/全国总计划），跨省招生占比较小，地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准16379名后移趋势、2026年物理类缩招5.5%、江苏省考生总数大幅增加约46%带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉负面信号的抑制作用，预计2026年最低位次；预测最低位次约16036名，区间15536–16536名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12546 → 13787 → 37178 (abnormal gap in 2023) → 14097 → 16379. In recent two years, it shows a backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 16379, which is about 2282 places behind 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 207 → 2022: 213 → 2023: 211 → 2024: 201 → 2025: 199 → 2026: 188. In 2026, enrollment will be reduced by about 5.5% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 26th, stable at 24–27 in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (theft in the bathroom of Qianwei Campus) and academic misconduct public opinion, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with some attention. In 2025, abnormal signals in Jiangsu Physics Category showed a sharp drop of 2700 places in law, and in Heilongjiang Province, the clinical group dropped by 1000 points. The gap signal may have a lagging effect on the following year's applications. It has 15 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Law A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc. The strong disciplinary strength has a strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., continue to be highly recommended, matching well with Jilin University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, an increase of about 46% compared to the total of about 357,675 in 2025 (Physics + History categories). Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category is about 379,000 candidates, with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. The undergraduate batch Physics Category score in 2025 is 463 points, steadily rising in recent years. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region, with no regional preference advantage for local candidates. The enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province is about 3–4% (about 199 in 2025 / total national plan), cross-provincial enrollment accounts for a small proportion, and regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the backward trend of the 2025 baseline of 16379, the 5.5% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 46% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the inhibitory effect of negative reputation signals, the minimum ranking for 2026 is predicted to be about 16036, with a range of 15536–16536.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<15536), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>16536), mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category has been approximately 1651 → 1922 → 2113 → 2280 → 2644, with a continuous backward shift for 5 consecutive years, accumulating a shift of about 993 places. The baseline for 2025 is about 2644. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 32 in 2021 → 25 in 2022 → 27 in 2023 → 37 in 2024 → 37 in 2025 → 42 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan expands by about 13.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 26th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable position between 24th and 27th in recent years, belonging to the top comprehensive universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents and academic misconduct public opinion, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 40th (relatively hot), with a certain level of attention. The 2025 abnormal signal for submission shows that Jilin University's law major in Jiangsu's Physics Category experienced a sharp drop, while no obvious break in the History Category was observed. Law is rated A, Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, etc. The university has outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines, which strongly attract applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law continues to be relatively hot and recommended; Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, an increase of about 46% compared to 2025. Based on recent proportions, the History Category is estimated to have about 142,000 candidates, with a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition. The undergraduate batch History Category score in 2025 was 482 points, with a steady upward trend in recent years. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region, with no regional preference advantage for candidates in this province. The enrollment proportion in Jiangsu's History Category is extremely small, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward shift trend of the 2025 baseline of 2644, the 13.5% expansion of the History Category in 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 46% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province, and the inhibitory effect of negative reputation signals, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect partially offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2908, with a range of 2494–3322.
